title: Safe ephemeral-resume callback (canonical pattern)
body: Demonstrates the §2.1 resume pattern: `callback.url` is an AGENT-OWNED re-invoke endpoint (not a third-party API), the credential is bound to that registered host (§9.4), and `state` is AEAD-sealed by the agent with a key the Hub never sees (§9.3). Compare with examples/callback-anti-pattern.md.

state.resume_token_hint: node:promote-build (encrypted inside `sealed`, shown here only as a label)
